'''Magro Slim''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Klatooinian/Legends|Klatooinian]] criminal affiliated with [[Eno Arba]] and [[Meeko Ghintee]]. In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], he was wanted by Administrator [[Rozatta]] with a bounty of 1,500 credits alive and 750 dead for damaging many of the [[Outland Transit Station]]'s bathrooms and sanitary facilities. His bounty was collected for 1,500 credits by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'' {{1st}}
